name: Classic V-Neck Scrub Top
description: A timeless v-neck scrub top with two front pockets and a chest pocket. Soft, breathable fabric keeps you comfortable through long shifts.

name: Mock Wrap Scrub Top
description: Flattering mock wrap design with a side tie and two spacious pockets. Perfect for a polished, professional look.

name: Moisture-Wick Scrub Top
description: Performance fabric with moisture-wicking technology. Four-way stretch keeps you moving freely during the busiest shifts.

name: Four-Pocket Scrub Top
description: Maximum storage with four functional pockets. Durable fabric holds its shape and color wash after wash.

name: Jogger Scrub Pants
description: Modern jogger-style scrub pants with tapered ankles, a drawstring waist, and deep side pockets. On-trend and ultra comfortable.

name: Straight Leg Scrub Pants
description: Classic straight leg cut with an elastic waistband and two side pockets. A wardrobe staple that pairs with any top.

name: Cargo Scrub Pants
description: Cargo-style pants with side cargo pockets for extra storage. Reinforced knees for durability on the floor.

name: Slim Fit Scrub Pants
description: Sleek slim-fit design that stays professional all shift long. Moisture-wicking fabric and a comfort waistband.

name: Classic Scrub Set
description: The essential matching set — Classic V-Neck Top paired with Straight Leg Pants. Everything you need, ready to go.

name: Comfort Scrub Set
description: Moisture-wicking top with matching jogger pants — the ultimate comfort combo for long shifts.

name: Performance Scrub Set
description: Four-way stretch fabric top and slim-fit pants. Built for nurses who need to move freely and look sharp doing it.

name: Essential Scrub Set
description: A soft lavender set that's as calming as it is functional. Mock wrap top with cargo pants for max storage.
